summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: The Dot Product
summary_sections.content_html:
The Dot Product

u · v = u₁v₁ + u₂v₂ (component formula)

u · v = |u||v| cos θ (geometric formula)

Properties

  • u · v = 0 ⟺ u ⊥ v (perpendicular).
  • u · u = |u|².
  • Commutative: u · v = v · u.

Projection

proj_u v = (v · u / |u|²) u — the component of v along u.
